name: Roasted Cajun Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the flour in a single layer inside the cooking bag and shake to coat evenly.
2. Place the bag with the coated flour in a 13 x 9 x 2 inch pan.
3. Set aside.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the melted butter and Worcestershire sauce.
5. Dip each chicken thigh into the butter mixture, then sprinkle with Creole Seasoning Blend.
6. Carefully place the seasoned chicken thighs into the cooking bag with the flour.
7. Close the bag securely with a nylon tie.
8. Make 6 slits (about half an inch wide) in the top of the bag to allow steam to escape during baking.
9. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 30 minutes, or until cooked through.
10. Makes 6 servings.
